	        Value.NativeQuery(

{
	    ("REVENUE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Revenue]), 0),
	    ("PAYROLL", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Payroll]), 1),
	    ("MARGIN", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Margin]), 2),
	    ("PAYROLL / REVENUE %", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Payroll / Revenue]), 3),
	    ("INVOICE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Invoice Count]),4),
	    ("AVERAGE INVOICE VALUE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Average Invoice Value (AIV)]), 5),
	    ("RESOURCES", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Active Resources]), 6),
	    ("CLIENTS", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Clients Count]), 7),
	    ("PROJECTS", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Projects Count (Interne)]), 8),
	    ("INTERCONTRACT COST", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Intercontract Cost]), 9),
	    ("OCCUPATION RATE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Occupation Rate]), 10),
	    ("TURNOVER", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Turnover]), 11)
	}

{
	    ("REVENUE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Revenue]), 1),
	    ("CLIENTS", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Clients Count]),2),
	    ("PROJECTS", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Projects Count (Client)]), 3),
	    ("INVOICE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Invoice Count]), 4),
	    ("ISSUED INVOICE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Issued Invoice Count]), 5),
	    ("ISSUED INVOICE TURNOVER", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Issued Invoice Turnover]), 6),
	    ("PAID INVOICE", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Paid Invoice Count]), 7),
	    ("PAID INVOICE TURNOVER", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Paid Invoice Turnover]), 8),
	    ("INVOICE IN COLLECTION COUNT", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Invoice in Collection Count]), 9),
	    ("INVOICE IN COLLECTION TURNOVER", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Invoice in Collection Turnover]), 10)
	}

{
	    ("RESOURCES", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Active Resources]), 0),
	    ("OCCUPATION RATE %", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Occupation Rate]), 1),
	    ("TRANSFER RATE %", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Transfer Rate %]), 2),
	    ("SENIORITY", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Seniority (in years)]), 3),
	    ("TURNOVER %", NAMEOF('KPIs'[Turnover]), 4)
	
	}

measures.name: Turnover
measures.expression:
VAR selected_start = MIN ( 'Dim Date'[Day] )
VAR selected_end   = MAX ( 'Dim Date'[Day] )
VAR departures =
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( 'Dim Resource Flow' ),
        KEEPFILTERS ( 'Dim Resource Flow'[flow_type] = "Departure" ),
        FILTER (
            'Dim Resource Flow',
            'Dim Resource Flow'[event_date] >= selected_start
                && 'Dim Resource Flow'[event_date] <= selected_end
        )
    )
RETURN
IF ( departures = 0, 0, departures )

VAR selected_window_end = MAX ( 'Dim Date'[Day] )
RETURN
AVERAGEX (
    FILTER (
        CALCULATETABLE ( 'Fact Contracts', REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Dim Date' ) ),
        'Fact Contracts'[contract_start_date] <= selected_window_end
    ),
    VAR end_count =  IF ( ISBLANK('Fact Contracts'[contract_end_date]) || 'Fact Contracts'[contract_end_date] >= selected_window_end, 
                        selected_window_end, 
                        'Fact Contracts'[contract_end_date] 
                     ...

measures.name: Occupation Rate YoY %
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Occupation Rate] - [Occupation Rate LY], [Occupation Rate LY])

measures.name: Occupation Rate QoQ %
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Occupation Rate] - [Occupation Rate LQ], [Occupation Rate LQ])

measures.name: Occupation Rate MoM %
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Occupation Rate] - [Occupation Rate LM], [Occupation Rate LM])

measures.name: Payroll / Revenue MoM %
measures.expression: DIVIDE( [Payroll / Revenue] - [Payroll / Revenue LM], [Payroll / Revenue LM] )

measures.name: Payroll / Revenue QoQ %
measures.expression: DIVIDE( [Payroll / Revenue] - [Payroll / Revenue LQ], [Payroll / Revenue LQ] )

measures.name: Payroll / Revenue YoY %
measures.expression: DIVIDE( [Payroll / Revenue] - [Payroll / Revenue LY], [Payroll / Revenue LY] )

measures.name: Working Days (Client)
measures.expression:
COALESCE(
    CALCULATE(
        SUM( 'Fact Sales'[delivery_production_times] ),
        FILTER( 'Dim Projects', NOT('Dim Projects'[project_typeof_name]) IN {"Projet Interne"})
    ),
    0
)

measures.name: Working Days (Interne)
measures.expression:
VAR ResourceSet =
    VALUES ( 'Dim Resources'[resource_id] )
RETURN
SUMX (
    ResourceSet,
    VAR WD =
        CALCULATE ( [Real Working Days] )
    VAR WDClient =
        CALCULATE ( [Working Days (Client)] )
    VAR     WDIntternalProject =
        CALCULATE ( [Working Days (Internal Proj.)] )
    VAR Abs =
        CALCULATE ( [Absences] )
    VAR InterPerResource =
        WD - WDClient - WDIntternalProject - Abs
    RETURN
        MAX ( 0, InterPerResource )
)

measures.name: Intercontract Resource
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('Dim Resources'[resource_id]),
    FILTER(
        'Dim Resources',
        [Working Days (Interne)] > 0
    )
)

measures.name: Absences
measures.expression:
VAR TotalAbsences =
    SUM ( 'Fact Absences'[absence_duration_day] )
RETURN
    COALESCE ( TotalAbsences, 0 )

measures.name: Transfers
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('Dim Agency Transfers'),
    'Dim Agency Transfers'[transfer_date] >= MIN('Dim Date'[Day]),
    'Dim Agency Transfers'[transfer_date] <= MAX('Dim Date'[Day])
)

        'Fact Contracts'[contract_start_date] <= selected_window_end
    ),
    VAR end_count =
        IF (
            ISBLANK ( 'Fact Contracts'[contract_end_date] )
                || 'Fact Contracts'[contract_end_date] >= selected_window_end,
            selected_window_end,
            'Fact Contracts'[contract_end_date]

    V...

measures.name: Seniority levels
measures.expression:
VAR m = [Seniority (in months)]
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISBLANK(m),        "Unknown",
    m <= 6,            "<6 mois",
    m <= 12,           "6–12 mois",
    m <= 24,           "1–2 ans",
    m <= 36,           "2–3 ans",
    m <= 48,           "3–4 ans",
                       ">4 ans"
)

measures.name: Average Invoice Value LM
measures.expression:

    [Average Invoice Value (AIV)],
    DATEADD('Dim Date'[day],-1, MONTH)
     )

measures.name: Average Invoice Value LQ

    [Average Invoice Value (AIV)],

measures.name: Average Payment Period (APP) Days
measures.expression:
```

AVERAGEX(
    FILTER(
        'Fact Invoices',
        'Fact Invoices'[invoice_state_name] = "Payée"                                   
            && NOT ISBLANK('Fact Invoices'[performed_payment_date])  -- date paiement connue
            && NOT ISBLANK('Fact Invoices'[invoice_date])             -- date facture connue
    ),
    DATEDIFF('Fact Invoices'[invoice_date], 'Fact Invoices'[performed_payment_date], DAY)
)
```

measures.name: Cost from Sales
measures.expression:
VAR is_internal_consultant =
    NOT (SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Fact Costs'[resource_type] ) IN {"Consultant Externe","Consultant Interne P","Conseil Assistance"})

VAR cost_internal_consultant =
   COALESCE (
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( 'Fact Costs'[times_reports_term] ),
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( 'Fact Costs'[resource_cost] ),
            FILTER (
                'Dim Projects',
                NOT ( 'Dim Projects'[project_typeof_name] IN { "Projet Interne" } )
            )
        )
 ...

     )

measures.name: Average Payment Period YoY %
measures.expression: DIVIDE( [Average Payment Period (APP) Days] - [Average Payment Period LY] , [Average Invoice Value LY])

measures.name: Active Resources
measures.expression:
```

VAR end_date = MAX('Dim Date'[day])
VAR active_resource = 
CALCULATE(
DISTINCTCOUNT('Fact Staffing'[resource_id]),
'Fact Staffing'[day] = end_date
)
RETURN
active_resource
```

measures.name: Intercontract Cost MoM %
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Intercontract Cost] - [Intercontract Cost LM], [Intercontract Cost LM])

measures.name: Intercontract Cost QoQ %
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Intercontract Cost] - [Intercontract Cost LQ], [Intercontract Cost LQ])

measures.name: Total Resource Cost
measures.expression:
VAR is_internal_consultant =
    NOT ( SELECTEDVALUE( 'Fact Costs'[resource_type] ) IN {"Consultant Externe", "Consultant Interne P", "Conseil Assistance"})

VAR cost_internal_consultant =
   COALESCE (
    SUMX (
        VALUES ( 'Fact Costs'[times_reports_term] ),
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( 'Fact Costs'[resource_cost] ) /*,
            FILTER (
                'Dim Projects',
                NOT ( 'Dim Projects'[project_typeof_name] IN { "Projet Interne" } )
            )*/
    ...

measures.name: Clients Count (sales)
measures.expression:
COALESCE(
    CALCULATE(
            DISTINCTCOUNT('Fact Sales'[client_id]),
            FILTER('Dim Projects', NOT('Dim Projects'[project_typeof_name]) IN {"Projet Interne"})
    ),0)

measures.name: Working Days (Internal Proj.)
measures.expression:
COALESCE(
    CALCULATE(
        SUM( 'Fact Sales'[delivery_production_times] ),
        FILTER( 'Dim Projects', 'Dim Projects'[project_typeof_name] IN {"Projet Interne"})
    ),
    0
)

        )

RETURN

        COUNTROWS ( 'Fact Contracts' ),

measures.name: Projects Count (Client)
measures.expression:
COALESCE(
    CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT( 'Fact Invoices'[project_id]),
    FILTER('Dim Projects', NOT('Dim Projects'[project_type] IN {"Projet Interne"})))
    ,0)

measures.name: Projects Count (Client) YoY %
measures.expression: DIVIDE( [Projects Count (Client)] - [Projects Count (Client) LY],  [Projects Count (Client) LY])

measures.name: Real Working Days
measures.expression:
```

VAR internal_days = SUM( 'Fact Payroll (Internal)'[resource_working_days_per_month])
VAR external_days = SUM( 'Fact Sales'[delivery_production_times])
VAR is_internal = NOT (SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Dim Resources'[resource_typeof_name] ) IN {"Consultant Externe","Consultant Interne P","Conseil Assistance"})
RETURN 
IF ( is_internal , internal_days, external_days)
```

VAR end_date = MAX('Dim Date'[day])
VAR active_resource = 
CALCULATE(
DISTINCTCOUNT('Fact Staffing'[resource_id]),
'Fact Staffing'[day] <= end_date
)
RETURN
active_resource
```

measures.name: Activity Filter
measures.expression:
VAR segment_start_date =
    MIN ( 'Dim Date'[day] )
VAR segment_end_date =
    MAX ( 'Dim Date'[day] )
VAR contract_start_date =
    DATEVALUE ( [Contract Start date] )
VAR contract_end_date_raw = [Contract End Date]
VAR contract_end_date =
    IF (
        contract_end_date_raw = "undefined",
        DATE ( 2099, 12, 31 ),
        DATE ( VALUE ( RIGHT ( contract_end_date_raw, 4 ) ), VALUE ( MID ( contract_end_date_raw, 4, 2 ) ), VALUE ( LEFT ( contract_end_date_raw, 2 ) ) )
    )

measures.name: flag from client
measures.expression: IF ( NOT ([Revenue from Client] = 0 && [Cost from Client] = 0) , 1, 0 )

partitions.mQuery:
let
	    Source = Value.NativeQuery(GoogleBigQuery.Database([BillingProject=BQ_Proj]){[Name=BQ_Proj]}[Data],
	"SELECT#(lf)  *#(lf)FROM `"&BQ_Proj&".technical.users_mapping`",
	    null,
	    [EnableFolding = true]
	)
	in
	    Source
